5.0 28/05/2025 All  [EIS November 2025: IBI-V6 version] 
First release of the IBI-MFC MY PHY/BGC-V6 
product. 
Increased spatial resolution up to 1/36º. 
Light attenuation (kd) new variable. 
Updated physical and biogeochemical 
models.

Modification of datasets configuration 
following new convention.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for the IBI_MULTIYEAR_BGC_005_003 product, detailing its specifications and updates from various contributors at MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL.
